content.situation: 朋友因为工作压力大而情绪低落，向你倾诉感到不堪重负
content.speakerText: I just can't keep up with everything anymore...
content.speakerTextCn: 我实在无法应对所有事情了...
content.responseTemplate: It's completely understandable to feel this way when you're overwhelmed. ___

blanks.answer: You're doing better than you think
options: You're doing better than you think
I know exactly how you feel
Why don't you quit your job?

content.hint: 用共情肯定对方的感受，再给予温和的鼓励，避免否定或建议

content.situation: 同事因为一次演讲失误而自责，说觉得自己很丢脸
content.speakerText: I messed up so badly—I feel so embarrassed...
content.speakerTextCn: 我搞砸得太厉害了，感觉特别丢脸...

blanks.answer: It doesn't define who you are
options: It doesn't define who you are
You should practice more next time
I told you not to do it

content.hint: 强调事件不等于个人价值，避免归因于个人能力
content.knowledgePoint: 区分行为与自我价值的安抚表达

content.situation: 家人因为人际关系冲突而难过，说没人理解自己
content.speakerText: No one gets me... I feel so alone...
content.speakerTextCn: 没人懂我……我感觉好孤单...

options: You should talk to them again

content.hint: 表达陪伴比解决问题更重要，避免立即提供建议或评判情绪
